help.header: gh tasks — manage tasks across GitHub Projects v2, Issues, and Milestones
help.flags:
Flags:
  --scope repo|org|user   Target scope
  --lang ja|en            Output language
  --help, -h              Show help
  --version, -v           Show version
help.cmd.add: Add an Issue or Project draft item
help.cmd.link: Link a PR to its Issue or Project item
error.auth.tokenMissing: GH_TOKEN / GITHUB_TOKEN is not set. Run `gh auth login`
error.repo.notResolved: Could not resolve a repository: pass --repo or run from a directory with a git remote `origin`
error.repo.cannotExtractFromRemote: Could not extract owner/name from git remote URL: '{url}'
error.scope.invalidForProjectResolution: Project node resolution is not supported in repo scope
error.project.repoScope: Projects v2 are not used in repo scope
error.project.notSpecified: --scope {scope} requires a Project. Pass --project=<owner>/<number> or set '{configKey}' in config
error.add.titleRequired: Title is required. Run `gh tasks add <title>`
error.done.idRequired: Issue ID is required. Run `gh tasks done <id>`
error.done.statusFieldMissing: Project has no `Status` field. Add one before running `gh tasks done` on an org/user-scope item
error.done.doneOptionMissing: Project `Status` field has no `Done` option. Add one before running `gh tasks done`
done.statusUpdated.project: Project item Status set to Done
error.link.argsRequired: Both PR and task numbers are required. Run `gh tasks link <pr> <task>`
link.added: Appended Closes link to the PR body
link.added.project: Linked PR and task on the project
plan.skippedExisting: Skipped (already bound to a different milestone)
plan.previewNote: (preview: pass --write to create the milestone and bind issues)
plan.empty.project: No project items in this range
plan.iterationFallback.project: No iteration matched; falling back to the current iteration
error.plan.iterationFieldMissing: Project has no `Iteration` field. Add one before running `gh tasks plan` on an org/user-scope project
error.plan.noIterationsAvailable: Project `Iteration` field has no iterations configured. Create iterations in Project settings
review.heading: Review
review.empty.project: No project items completed in this range
standup.heading: Standup
error.standup.invalidSince: Invalid --since value: '{value}' (expected RFC3339 timestamp such as '2026-05-04T00:00:00Z')
error.standup.viewerLoginUnresolved: Could not resolve viewer login. Run `gh auth status` to confirm the active user
error.done.searchLimit: Project item '{id}' was not found in the first {limit} items. Linear search is bounded by this limit; resolving items by id beyond it requires Node(id:) lookup which is not yet implemented
error.projects.subcommandRequired: Subcommand required. Example: `gh tasks projects init --template user --title '...'`
error.projectsInit.titleRequired: --title is required. Example: `gh tasks projects init --template user --title 'my todo'`
error.projectsInit.templateRequired: Either --template <user|org> or a YAML path is required
error.projectsInit.templateConflict: --template and a YAML path cannot be combined
projectsInit.dryRunHeader: (--dry-run) Would create Project '{title}' under owner '{owner}' with these fields:
warn.transport.partial: warning: GraphQL returned a partial response while running '{op}': {message}. The operation will fail; retry after the rate-limit window or check token permissions.
install.heading: gh tasks install-skills (target: {target})
install.action.conflict: ! {path} (conflict — file exists but is not tracked by gh-tasks)
install.uninstall.heading: gh tasks install-skills --uninstall (target: {target})
install.uninstall.nothingToDo: Nothing to uninstall: no per-adapter manifest found under target. Run `gh tasks install-skills` first or pass --agent <name> if you want to remove a specific adapter regardless.
install.summary.installed: Installed skills for {agent}: {created} created, {updated} updated, {skipped} unchanged
install.check.diff: FAIL: {count} file(s) differ for {agent} — run `gh tasks install-skills` to apply
error.install.noAgentDetected: No agent detected under target. Use --agent <name> to specify (valid: {valid})
error.install.targetNotADirectory: Target path is not a directory: {path}
error.install.conflict:
{count} skill file(s) conflict with existing untracked files for {agent}.

Resolutions:
  - rename install with a prefix:    gh tasks install-skills --namespace gh-tasks
  - overwrite (saves <path>.bak):    gh tasks install-skills --force
  - inspect each conflict and resolve manually before retrying
error.install.embedNotAvailable: Embedded skill SSOT is not available in this build
error.install.loadSkills: Could not load embedded skill SSOT: {reason}
error.json.jqWithoutJson: --jq requires --json. Pass --json with one or more fields (run --json with no value to list available fields).
error.json.writeNotSupported: --json output for --write is not supported in this version. Run without --write to preview as JSON, or omit --json to apply the changes.
